src/main/java/ru/practicum/shareit/booki.general_idea: Introduce Lombok @RequiredArgsConstructor to generate constructor injection for final fields.
Add final BookingService field to enable dependency injection via Lombok.
Implement POST endpoint to create a new booking.
Implement PATCH endpoint to update booking approval status.
Implement GET endpoint to retrieve a single booking by ID.
Implement GET endpoint to retrieve all bookings for the current user.
Implement GET endpoint to retrieve all bookings owned by the current user.
Remove placeholder TODO comment indicating incomplete sprint work.
Update imports to include new dependencies for DTOs, models, services, and enums.
Added @Data annotation to replace boilerplate getters, setters, and toString methods.
Added itemId field to the DTO to identify the booked item.
Added start field to the DTO to define the booking start time.
Added end field to the DTO to define the booking end time.

src/main/java/ru/practicum/shareit/item/.general_idea: Introduce Lombok @RequiredArgsConstructor to simplify constructor injection.
Inject ItemService to handle business logic for items.
Implement endpoint to create a new item.
Implement endpoint to update an existing item.
Implement endpoint to retrieve a single item by ID.
Implement endpoint to retrieve all items owned by a user.
Implement endpoint to search for items by text.
Implement endpoint to add a comment to an item.
Add Lombok @Data annotation to the DTO class to automatically generate boilerplate methods like getters, setters, toString, equals, and hashCode.
Define the data structure of the ItemDto by adding name, description, and available fields.
src/main/java/ru/practicum/shareit/item/.human_impl: private final String name; private final String description; private final Boolean available;

src/main/java/ru/practicum/shareit/item/.general_idea: Remove the placeholder TODO comment indicating the sprint task is now implemented.
Convert the class into a JPA entity using Jakarta Persistence annotations to replace the older javax.persistence API.
Add Lombok annotations to automatically generate boilerplate code like getters, setters, and toString.
Define the data fields for the Item entity including id, name, description, and availability status.
src/main/java/ru/practicum/shareit/item/.human_impl: private Integer id; private String name; private String description; private Boolean available;

src/main/java/ru/practicum/shareit/item/.general_idea: Establish a many-to-one relationship with the User entity to link items to their owners.

src/main/java/ru/practicum/shareit/reque.general_idea: Add Lombok @Data annotation to generate boilerplate methods for the entity class.
Add integer id field to the ItemRequest entity.
Add string description field to the ItemRequest entity.
Add User requestor field to the ItemRequest entity.
Add LocalDateTime created field to the ItemRequest entity.

src/main/java/ru/practicum/shareit/user/.general_idea: Added Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate code for logging and dependency injection.
Implemented REST controller methods for user CRUD operations.
Injected UserService to handle business logic within the controller.
Added informational logging for incoming HTTP requests.
Updated imports to include new dependencies and wildcard imports for Spring annotations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.2 to 3.3.2 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Update the target Java version property from 11 to 21.
Add Spring Boot Actuator for production-ready features like health checks and metrics.
Add Spring Data JPA starter to enable ORM capabilities.
Change H2 database dependency scope from runtime to test, implying it is only used for testing.
Remove explicit runtime scope from PostgreSQL driver, relying on default compile scope or transitive management.
Update SpotBugs Maven plugin from 4.7.0.0 to 4.8.5.0 for better static analysis.
Update JaCoCo Maven plugin from 0.8.8 to 0.8.12 for improved code coverage reporting.
Reformat pom.xml indentation from tabs to spaces for consistent style.

checkstyle.xml.general_idea: Update the commented-out Checkstyle import order configuration to reflect the migration from javax to jakarta namespaces.
checkstyle.xml.human_impl: Changed specialImportsRegExp from '^javax\.' to '^jakarta\.' in checkstyle.xml

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Removed explicit PostgreSQL 10 dialect configuration to allow Hibernate to auto-detect the dialect, which is preferred in newer versions.
Changed the database driver from H2 in-memory to PostgreSQL to support persistent storage.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.human_impl: Changed spring.datasource.driverClassName from org.h2.Driver to org.postgresql.Driver

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Updated the database connection URL to point to a local PostgreSQL instance instead of an H2 memory database.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.human_impl: Changed spring.datasource.url from jdbc:h2:mem:shareit to jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/shareit

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Updated database username and password placeholders for the new PostgreSQL connection.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.human_impl: Changed spring.datasource.username to username and spring.datasource.password to password

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Removed the specific profile activation line for ci/test, likely consolidating configuration or relying on default profiles.
